caption: A man with white hair and a white beard, wearing a light-beige Nehru jacket over a matching long-sleeved shirt, stands behind a wooden lectern delivering a speech. He is positioned in front of a textured, green stone wall featuring an abstract, geometric carved pattern. To his right is a tall, golden columnar structure adorned with small pink floral accents. Two microphones on flexible stands are attached to the lectern in front of him. Across the sequence, the man is captured in mid-speech, shifting his facial expressions and slight head movements. He begins by looking slightly to his right, then turns more toward the center, briefly looking straight ahead, and finally shifts his gaze back toward the right while gesturing slightly with his left hand near the edge of the lectern. The setting and his attire remain consistent throughout the clip.
